nasb.text: from thirty years and upward even to fifty years old, you shall number them, everyone who enters the service to do the work of the tent of meeting.

esv.text: From thirty years old up to fifty years old, you shall list them, everyone who can come on duty, to do the service of the tent of meeting.

cnv.text: 從三十歲以上，直到五十歲，能進來供職，在會幕裡工作的，你都要數點。

ccb.text: 登记三十岁到五十岁、可在会幕司职的男子。
